subject: did you see it?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce4b/3eb3e2fc/46a731ed/744aac9c/3089741359/VEsH/ "https://www.julianforthefuture.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20190705_em_debate-recap&source=20190705_em_debate-recap")
---
| | Can you feel the excitement? Last Wednesday night, Julian powerfully stood upon the Democratic debate stage leaving the country fired up to say "Adios" to Trump. By the end of night one, he had boldly introduced himself as a defender of reproductive justice, immigrants' rights, the transgender community, and working families. **Voters across the U.S. now have a true sense of what a Castro nomination would look like, and they love what they see.**
* **[A post-debate NBC News poll](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce4b/3eb3e2fc/46a731ed/744aac9b/3089741359/VEsE/ "http://twitter.com/NBCNews/status/1144451828693778432?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+A+postdebate+NBC+News+poll&utm_campaign=20190705_em_debate-recap&source=20190705_em_debate-recap") shows that 5 out of 6 believe that Julian came out on top for both debate nights.**

* **[A Five Thirty Eight poll](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce4b/3eb3e2fc/46a731ed/744aac9a/3089741359/VEsF/ "http://projects.fivethirtyeight.com/democratic-debate-poll/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3+-+A+Five+Thirty+Eight+poll&utm_campaign=20190705_em_debate-recap&source=20190705_em_debate-recap") has shown an overall 20 point increase in favorability--more than any other candidate.**

* **[Univision reported that Julian doubled his support among Latino voters](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce4b/3eb3e2fc/46a731ed/744aac99/3089741359/VEsC/ "https://www.univision.com/univision-news/politics/harris-and-castro-rise-among-hispanics-after-the-first-democratic-debate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=4+-+Univision+reported+that+Juliaacuten+doub&utm_campaign=20190705_em_debate-recap&source=20190705_em_debate-recap") and was the top choice for respondents to tackle the issue of immigration.**

* **[And Tuesday morning, ABC News released a national poll with Julian at 4%](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce4b/3eb3e2fc/46a731ed/744aac98/3089741359/VEsD/ "https://abcnews.go.com/Politics/harris-scores-debate-performance-electability-biden-front/story?id=64092090&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=5+-+And+Tuesday+morning+ABC+News+released+a+&utm_campaign=20190705_em_debate-recap&source=20190705_em_debate-recap")--hurdling over other candidates he's been trailing in polls.**

[](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce4b/3eb3e2fc/46a731ed/744aac87/3089741359/VEsA/ "https://abcnews.go.com/Politics/harris-scores-debate-performance-electability-biden-front/story?id=64092090&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=20190705_em_debate-recap&source=20190705_em_debate-recap") [Julian's Google searches increased by around 3,000% during the debates](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce4b/3eb3e2fc/46a731ed/744aac86/3089741359/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/MSNBC/status/1144059607830151170?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+Juliaacutens+Google+searches+increased+b&utm_campaign=20190705_em_debate-recap&source=20190705_em_debate-recap"), and [#AdiosTrump](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce4b/3eb3e2fc/46a731ed/744aac85/3089741359/VEsO/ "https://store.julianforthefuture.com/adios-trump-navy-tee/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=8+-+AdioacutesTrump&utm_campaign=20190705_em_debate-recap&source=20190705_em_debate-recap") was the top trending hashtag of the night. [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce4b/3eb3e2fc/46a731ed/744aac84/3089741359/VEsP/ "https://store.julianforthefuture.com/adios-trump-navy-tee/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=9&utm_campaign=20190705_em_debate-recap&source=20190705_em_debate-recap") **The press also had a lot to say about Juli an's performance.**
* **[CNN's Van Jones "nerded out" over Julian's "Texas Takedown."](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce4b/3eb3e2fc/46a731ed/744aac83/3089741359/VEsHBQ/ "https://www.facebook.com/cnn/videos/2311960109058916/?v=2311960109058916&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=10+-+CNNrsquos+Van+Jones+ldquonerded+outrdquo&utm_campaign=20190705_em_debate-recap&source=20190705_em_debate-recap")**

* **[The _New York Times_ crowned him the winner of night one.](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce4b/3eb3e2fc/46a731ed/744aac82/3089741359/VEsHBA/ "https://www.nytimes.com/2019/06/26/us/politics/2020-democratic-debate-tonight.html?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+The+New+York+Times+crowned+him+the+winne&utm_campaign=20190705_em_debate-recap&source=20190705_em_debate-recap")**

* **[The _Washington Post_ highlighted the way he brought up the transgender community in a conversation about reproductive health care.](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce4b/3eb3e2fc/46a731ed/744aac81/3089741359/VEsHBw/ "https://www.washingtonpost.com/dc-md-va/2019/06/27/first-debate-transgender-issues-came-up-like-never-before?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+ThenbspWashington+Post+highlighted+the+w&utm_campaign=20190705_em_debate-recap&source=20190705_em_debate-recap")**

[**And this week, he sat with Rachel Maddow**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce4b/3eb3e2fc/46a731ed/744aac80/3089741359/VEsHBg/ "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro/status/1146235531157745664?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+And+this+week+he+sat+with+Rachel+Maddow&utm_campaign=20190705_em_debate-recap&source=20190705_em_debate-recap") to discuss how his debate performance helped thrust his campaign in the spotlight and showed he has the policy, experience and background to take on Trump. **If you're new to #TeamJuli an, welcome. ** **And thank you all for your support.** We are a growing movement, and we need your help to reach more people so they can get to know the kind of leader Julian is and why we need him as President. [Please consider donating so Julian can reach the 130,000 unique donor mark](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce4b/3eb3e2fc/46a731ed/744aac8f/3089741359/VEsHAQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-castro-2020?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+Please+consider+donating+so+Juliaacuten+&utm_campaign=20190705_em_debate-recap&source=20190705_em_debate-recap") and qualify for the September debates. If you've already contributed, share this email with a friend! We're going to keep going strong and help Julian share his bold vision for our future. Thank you!
**#TeamJuli an** [**DONATE**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce4b/3eb3e2fc/46a731ed/744aac8e/3089741359/VEsHAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-castro-2020?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=15+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20190705_em_debate-recap&source=20190705_em_debate-recap")
---
| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce4b/3eb3e2fc/46a731ed/744aac8d/3089741359/VEsHAw/ "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=16&utm_campaign=20190705_em_debate-recap&source=20190705_em_debate-recap")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce4b/3eb3e2fc/46a731ed/744aac8c/3089741359/VEsHAg/ "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=17&utm_campaign=20190705_em_debate-recap&source=20190705_em_debate-recap")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce4b/3eb3e2fc/46a731ed/744aac8b/3089741359/VEsHDQ/ "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=18&utm_campaign=20190705_em_debate-recap&source=20190705_em_debate-recap")

| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the first debates and send him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must reach 130,000 donors this summer to secure his spot on the Democratic debate stage.

Julian hasn't qualified yet, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money. Will you help him get there?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce4b/3eb3e2fc/46a731ed/744aac8a/3089741359/VEsHDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=19+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20190705_em_debate-recap&source=20190705_em_debate-recap")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce4b/3eb3e2fc/46a731ed/744aac89/3089741359/VEsEBQ/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=20+-+here&utm_campaign=20190705_em_debate-recap&source=20190705_em_debate-recap"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce4b/3eb3e2fc/46a731ed/744aac88/3089741359/VEsEBA/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=21+-+here&utm_campaign=20190705_em_debate-recap&source=20190705_em_debate-recap"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

subject: Want to have dinner with me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Help me commemorate a historic occasion. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=efacc845ac7cf10c596b760c58bd59f4821613eff62cd78ef8f7a4ce4d30a820165b0c5fda3e4e522978018ea80cd4f742b7b96f291f1971)
---

Friend,

Three years ago, I stood on the stage at the Republican National Convention in Cleveland, Ohio and promised to be a president who fights for ALL Americans.

The FAKE NEWS media laughed at us and told us we had NO CHANCE to win, but you stood by me and we proved them wrong.

_To celebrate all of our unprecedented success, I 'm headed back to where our historic journey began..._

I'm hosting a dinner in Cleveland, Ohio to commemorate the historic 2016 convention, and I've reserved a spot for one very special guest - **_YOU._**

You and a guest of your choice have the chance to join me in Cleveland for an unforgettable experience.
---
| **[All you have to do is contribute ANY AMOUNT before July 8th at 11:59 PM to be automatically entered to win a very special dinner with me in Cleveland on July 12th.>>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=efacc845ac7cf10c15fbbb1950737d86d8c4054a7c9d6e412e94e74198d74b0d7a2fa4e42e6bfef593cc3ff50c5d421da629e57544f87671)**
[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=efacc845ac7cf10cdf3407ea051589c831682934b4436ad0033064ed89a98d0f6e036ab22a894be41365daac29859f6c4186a77a7449d39e) ** [CONTRIBUTE $20](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=efacc845ac7cf10c90298b0e66da754c87d419a30f55173a149f40a1af85fa93d32e8cdbac740d7c85f67206c416150127fc9b6ba51216f9)** ** [CONTRIBUTE $15](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=efacc845ac7cf10c5f7d4d86b39f82541be58e9de3ea381c01924568986e6c746b13accc892fbe3a9225dbaa990a51cc73ad4b74e4a8951f)** ** [CONTRIBUTE $10](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=efacc845ac7cf10ce203f47693330393fe30caa7a3734fb6fb54e7ab620cd4469fb2df93445fb23e715312b9d06b267c41968b1f51b2918c)** ** [CONTRIBUTE $5](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=efacc845ac7cf10ce1a66a7a1cc4821fd2722105755306a01d69f2f59cfe816ef76df8d1e2d36aea0ee00c9be9bb0f482e164493660d2233)** ** [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=efacc845ac7cf10cd16ebef9e8aecd5ee9ea7627948235b8396fff9bddbfcab9d2e746c6e5bbc88c3a05434ab2feb1402e457a7fc12e5664)**
You'll win dinner, your very own **_VIP GOLD PASS_** , and get a photo with me. My team will even cover the cost of your flight, hotel, and meal.

I can't wait to have dinner with you soon, Friend.

**[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT immediately to win dinner with me.>>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=efacc845ac7cf10c3b3638727a28d1a261536c18ea243bf73bc3584b1fd1efa8c5304b779540b1093712d4fd75fac901faf6c5573d4583ae)**

body:

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/honoring-america?e=1acd9bb3d6)

Honoring America

I’m going to keep my note to you this week short. That’s because if you’re like me, you’re busy this holiday weekend spending time with family and honoring America.

Last night as I watched the fireworks with my kids, I reflected on everything that makes America the greatest country in the world. Of course, it started with our founders and the principles they laid out in the Declaration of Independence signed 243 years ago – that we are “endowed by [our] Creator with certain unalienable Rights, that among these are Life, Liberty and the pursuit of Happiness."

Together, 243 years ago our founders set out a vision of government formed through the consent of the governed – almost unheard of at the time in a world led by hereditary kings. Today, our founders’ vision is thriving as Americans go to the ballot box each election and select our fellow Americans to lead us at the local, state and national levels. It’s freedom and democracy in action.

I also reflected on how lucky we are today to have such great leaders who have stepped up to take that mantle of freedom to lead us – ranging from President Donald Trump and Vice President Mike Pence in Washington, Governor Eric Holcomb at the Statehouse, and our many, many Republican leaders at county courthouses and city/town halls across our great state.

And finally, I reflected on the people who keep America free – our veterans and our active-duty servicemembers. It’s because of their service and sacrifice that America stands as a beacon of hope and freedom around the world.

I love America, and I love the 4^th of July. Happy Independence Day weekend, Hoosiers

-Kyle Hupfer

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Add your name: Let's help level the playing field for women of color
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
The gender wage gap hits women of color particularly hard. Employers trap women of color in lower wages by using salary history to make new offers. Black and Brown women are disproportionately... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ede4/45c30650/171e0414c/669db381/1078457238/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
When there's something we need to do to take care of the people we love, no matter how hard it is, we reach down, pull it up, and do what we need to do.

That's the story of people across the country -- going to work before the sun's up, taking extra classes, scrambling to find child care so they can gain a foothold to work for the American dream.

But right now, because of decades of systemic discrimination, when women of color work to provide financial security for their families, they face a steeper climb.

**The gender wage gap hits women of color particularly hard. Employers trap women of color in lower wages by using salary history to make new offers. Black and Brown women are disproportionately mistreated at work. And their path to higher-level management jobs is rockier.

[ It's time to get to work to right those wrongs. So today, I'm announcing my new plan to help boost wages for women of color and open up new pathways to the leadership positions they deserve. Add your name if you're with me in this fight.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ede4/45c30650/171e0414c/669db380/1078457238/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDcwNWVtMS12MXMzIn0=/ "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-woc?source=20190705em1-v1s3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

On Day One of a Warren administration, we'll make this plan happen with a series of executive actions:

**1\. Historic new requirements for federal contractors.**

Companies with federal contracts employ roughly a quarter of the U.S. workforce. By imposing new rules on companies that hope to receive federal contracts, we can take a big step toward creating equal opportunities for Black, Latina, Native American, Asian and other women of color.

Companies with bad track records on equal pay and management diversity won't get new contracts. No contractor will be permitted to use forced arbitration clauses, or non-compete clauses for low- and medium-wage workers.

We'll ban contractors from asking applicants for past salary information and criminal histories, and ensure fair pay and benefits for all of their workers -- including a $15 minimum wage, paid family leave, fair scheduling, and collective bargaining rights. This will have an outsized effect on Black and Brown women, who perform a disproportionate share of lower-wage work.

**2\. Making sure the senior ranks of the federal government look like America.**

Right now, the federal government does a dismal job on diversity and inclusion. The share of Latinas in the federal workforce is about half that of the entire workforce. And even though Black women are disproportionately represented in the federal workforce, they are nearly absent from its leadership ranks.

My administration will ensure that federal agencies recruit women of color and develop leadership paths for them. If we're going to demand more of the private sector, we should demand more of the government too.

**3\. Strengthening and targeting enforcement against systemic discrimination.**

Sectors that disproportionately employ Black and Brown women -- such as the low-wage service industry -- have higher rates of discriminatory practices. But women in these sectors are much less likely to report violations.

I will direct federal agencies to target enforcement toward industries where we know women of color face higher rates of discrimination.

**This new plan is just the first step -- but it's a necessary one. It's time to build an America that recognizes the role that women of color play in their families and in the economy, that fairly values their work, and that delivers equal opportunity for everyone.

[Add your name if you agree, and let's work side by side to make sure _everyone_ has an opportunity to fight for the American dream.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ede4/45c30650/171e0414c/669db380/1078457238/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDcwNWVtMS12MXMzIn0=/ "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-woc?source=20190705em1-v1s3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| | This is a long email. I really need you to read the entire thing -- [**and then consider donating $19 to my campaign before midnight. >>**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce4e/3eb3e2fc/47440b0f/744aa877/3293186242/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190705_em_fr_b1_castro_all_rs&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25") At the debates, my message resonated with America. I know why. My life hasn't always been easy, and I know yours hasn't either. I understand the struggle real people in this country face. I watched my grandmother clean other people's houses for a living. She never got past the 4th grade. She came here from Mexico when she was seven, rolled up her sleeves, and worked 20-hour days to give us a better life. My mom was a single mom. She experienced first-hand that gut-wrenching feeling of not being able to put food on the table when my brother and I were little. I felt guilty when I got sick because it meant that my family would be crushed under bills from the doctor. I know what it feels like to be from an immigrant family, in a neighborhood that doesn't have much privilege. I grew up in one. **Here is the bottom line -- I get it because I 've lived it: ** I know how much equal pay would have meant for my mom -- that's why I stood up for it at the debates this week. I see my grandmother in the images of the babies separated from their parents at the border -- that's why I stood up for a humane immigration plan. I see my childhood neighborhood when I go to Flint, Michigan and hear about kids living without drinking water -- that's why I'm standing up for lead policy. I see my son and daughter in the faces of children with no access to quality education -- that's why I'm fighting for universal pre-K for all. I promise you this: I will always -- always -- fight for you. And I need you to fight for me today. If you want to keep me in this race, to see me at the next debates, and to help me build a sustainable campaign that's in it for the long haul, I need you right now. This is a critically important moment for me. name: Team Kamala
subject: Commit to hosting a Englewood Debate Watch Party
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
Just last week, Kamala was up on the Democratic debate stage fighting hard and sharing her positive vision for our country -- and we couldn’t be more proud. During the debate, thousands of Kamala supporters gathered at more than 200 house parties around the country to cheer her on -- some in living rooms, some at bars, fired up to work for the change our country needs. As you know, there’s another Democratic debate just around the corner at the end of July, and we need to start organizing now to make it even bigger and better than the last one. **[Can we count on you to host a debate watch party in your area?](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/org-july-debate-commit?refcode=ema190705-debatehost1-full&source=ema190705-debatehost1-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1&akid=5526%2E5755789%2Ew7JQc6)** | | [COMMIT TO HOST](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/org-july-debate-commit?refcode=ema190705-debatehost1-full&source=ema190705-debatehost1-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=2&akid=5526%2E5755789%2Ew7JQc6)
---
We don’t know which night Kamala will take the stage -- either July 30 or July 31 -- but that won’t stop us from organizing now. It’s clear the debate will be another big moment for our campaign. The more people get to know Kamala, the stronger our movement grows.
**It’s a pretty simple equation: more people hearing directly from Kamala on the debate stage = more momentum for our movement.**
We’re counting on you to make sure as many people as possible are watching Kamala in this next debate. Commit to hosting a watch party in your area:
| [COMMIT TO HOST](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/org-july-debate-commit?refcode=ema190705-debatehost1-full&source=ema190705-debatehost1-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=3&akid=5526%2E5755789%2Ew7JQc6)
---
Once you sign up to host, our team will be in touch to make sure you’ve got everything you need to host a successful event -- whether it’s your first political event or your 100th.
We know we can count on Kamala to do her job on the debate stage. We know we can count on you to show your support by hosting or joining a debate watch party in a few weeks.
— Team Kamala

PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE

| | Peter -- Nevada JUST instituted one of the most progressive voting rights laws in the nation for Americans who have successfully served their prison sentences.- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Peter -- [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0729/72412298/43f6dc71/61025f89/648325746/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_190705_NevadaVotingRights_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190705_NevadaVotingRights_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190705_NevadaVotingRights_U1_X1") Nevada JUST instituted one of the most progressive voting rights laws in the nation for Americans who have successfully served their prison sentences. _**Now for the bad news:**_ _**There are still 32 states that restrict voting rights for people after they 've successfully served their time in prison.**_ Republicans will continue to work nonstop to prevent these states from passing progressive enfranchisement laws because they know that when more people vote, Democrats win. [**Sign on to our petition if you think it 's necessary that all 50 states grant voting rights to released felons immediately >>**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0729/72412298/43f6dc71/61025f88/648325746/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://voterprotect.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/VPP_EM_EN_190705_NevadaVotingRights_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+Sign+on+to+our+petition+if+you+think+itr&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190705_NevadaVotingRights_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190705_NevadaVotingRights_U1_X1") | | | [Expanded enfranchisement now >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0729/72412298/43f6dc71/61025f8b/648325746/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_190705_NevadaVotingRights_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Expanded+enfranchisement+now+gtgt&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190705_NevadaVotingRights_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190705_NevadaVotingRights_U1_X1")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: Marc Flores on Immigration
body:
** Peter,

With all of the rhetoric regarding the border, it is imperative for elected officials to come together to create a comprehensive, safe, and legal plan to rectify the issue of immigration.
------------------------------------------------------------

Immigrants today are viewed by some as criminals, seen with bias and prejudice by Americans as violent and inhuman. But the truth is, most immigrants are seeking a better life, often fleeing violence, and have no criminal record before making the decision to come to America. These people are risking everything for the prospect of opportunity, for the chance of a better life found in the American Promise. They deserve our attention, they deserve deliberation.

https://www.houstonchronicle.com/immigration/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=f753c14984-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_07_05_05_00&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-f753c14984-32267927
Houston Chronicle reports on family separation.

Beyond every moral implication, beyond the fact that it is inhumane to keep people indefinitely locked in a cage, there are constitutional issues at hand:

The Due Process Clause of the 5th Amendment to the Constitution states that “No person shall be held to answer for a...crime...nor be deprived of life, liberty, or property, without due process of law.”

Everyone who enters this country, regardless of their standing as a citizen, has the right to a fair trial, has the right to be kept alive, to be treated like a human.

According to our Constitution, the ongoing detainment of immigrants without due process is unconstitutional.

https://www.chron.com/technology/businessinsider/article/A-Fox-News-host-compared-desperately-overcrowded-14069229.php?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=f753c14984-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_07_05_05_00&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-f753c14984-32267927#photo-17796676
Houston Chronicle's "look inside migrant cages."

Comprehensive immigration reform includes providing a sensible pathway to citizenship for immigrants, in addition to those that are members of DACA, DAPA and TPS; a fundamental restructuring of our asylum and VISA programs; support for those countries that people are fleeing; funding to enhance the technology at our borders.

We must stand together to protect human rights, and abide by our constitution. This is a matter of doing what is legal, and doing what is right. When I am in office, I will not rest until we have a comprehensive, humane, modern solution for our border.

Be sure to follow us on social media to stay up to date with our plan for immigration. Thank you for your continued support.

Together, we can do better!

Marc Flores

I need to know I have your support so we can qualify for the next debates and prove wrong everyone who said a kid from the West Side of San Antonio doesn't have a shot.

| | | We are FOUR days away from Election Night and I can't think of a better way to ring in the night than with you, the people of NC's 3rd Congressional District.

**Please join me on Tuesday, July 9th at the Laughing Owl in Kinston, NC. Once the polls close at 7:30, we're headed to the Laughing Owl at 108 West North St. Kinston, NC and we hope to see you there. If you plan on joining us, RSVP[here. ](mailto:team@drjoanperry.com?subject=Election%20Night%20RSVP)**

It has been an incredibly humbling experience getting to meet each and every one of you. Your support has been so comforting to my husband, Jimbo, and me, and we can't thank you enough. But this race is still far from over.

**The polls will be open Tuesday, July 9th and we need your help to make sure our friends, families and neighbors are voting!** Every single vote is critical to securing a victory for Eastern, NC. So, take your friends to the polls on Tuesday and then head on down to Laughing Owl to commemorate the night with us!

Joan Perry

name: Cory Booker
subject: I want to hear from you on this
body:
| | |
---
| Team, Since I left the debate stage a week ago, over 20,000 people made their first donation to help build this campaign. I'm still blown away. My team tells me you're still waiting to take that step. [**I need to ask: Will you take a minute to let me know what 's holding you back?**](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc098d/5fca0d19/85b9f11/291bd582/200404301/VEsH/ "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/ND-Survey-2?source=em_20190705") I know that this is a really crowded field of amazing Democrats -- some of them are really good friends of mine. That's why I don't expect anyone to be all in for me and me alone right now. But making a donation means something a little different in this election. Because of the DNC's debate rules, each candidate needs 130,000 individual donors to qualify for the fall debates. That makes every donation a statement that you believe I belong on that stage. If an underdog campaign like ours is going to have a shot, we need to be at every single debate. If you've been waiting for the right time to chip in, now is that moment. [**I 'd be honored if you made your first donation today.**](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190705-surv?refcode=em_surv_20190705_CB_20190705-surv-CB-ndsurveySS-2020ndnr_2020ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") But if you're not ready, I get it. [**Take a minute to tell me what would change your mind.**](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc098d/5fca0d19/85b9f11/291bd582/200404301/VEsF/ "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/ND-Survey-2?source=em_20190705") Thank you, Cory
